name: startlink
description: StartLink Windows customer service desktop client

scripts.dev: npm run rebuild:native && npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite --configLoader runner --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.dev:multi: npm run rebuild:native && npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite --configLoader runner --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron . --profile=agent-a" "wait-on tcp:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron . --profile=agent-b"
scripts.check:quick: tsc --noEmit --pretty false --skipLibCheck && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit --pretty false && npm run lint:core && npm run lint:hooks && vitest --configLoader runner run tests/unit/architecture-boundaries.spec.ts tests/unit/desktop-api-validation.spec.ts && npm run docs:check && npm run p19:audit && npm run lint:shape
scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && vite build --configLoader runner && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json
scripts.test:coverage:core: vitest --configLoader runner run tests/unit --coverage.enabled true --coverage.provider v8 --coverage.reporter text --coverage.include "src/main/runtime-diagnostics.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/api-contract/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/auth/auth-session.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/auth/*diagnostics.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/conversation/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/customer-service/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/diagnostics/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/gateway/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/im/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/im-read/*diagnostics.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/im-read/*service.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/im-read/*storage.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/im-read/*view-model.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/message/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/message-core/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/data/performance/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/messages/diagnostics/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/messages/models/**/*.ts" --coverage.include "src/renderer/customer-service/models/**/*.ts" --coverage.thresholds.lines 65 --coverage.thresholds.functions 70 --coverage.thresholds.branches 55 --coverage.thresholds.statements 63
scripts.test:browser: npm run build && cross-env CI=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WEB_SERVER_PORT=34073 playwright test
scripts.test:full: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:browser
scripts.dist:win: node scripts/patch-electron-builder-nsis-spawn.mjs && npm run rebuild:native && npm run build && electron-builder --win nsis
